Notice Of Motion For Jury Trial Statement Of Facts, Memorandum Of Points & Authorities, Verification
Off Calendar Jul-22-2009 Denied

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff in Propria Persona for failure to file Proof of Service of Summons and Complaint, obtain answer or enter default is heard this day. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976 (212)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
